case.title: NOLLMAN & CO. v. WENTWORTH LUNCH CO

opinion.h: NOLLMAN & CO. v. WENTWORTH LUNCH CO, 217 U.S. 591 (1910)
opinion.p: NOLLMAN & CO., Appellants and Petitioners, v. WENTWORTH LUNCH COMPANY. No. 154.
Supreme Court of the United States
Mr. Maurice P. Davidson for appellants and petitioners.
Mr. R. R. Billington for appellee and respondent.
Judgment affirmed on the authority of Toxaway Hotel Co. v. J. L. Smathers & Co. (decided February 21, 1910) 216 U.S. 439, 54 L. ed. --, 30 Sup. Ct. Rep. 263.
